reviews.review_title: can u bring this back pls
reviews.review_description: this was one of the best games i’ve played back in 2022 and i really miss it
This game was peak in 2022 but servers shutdown there is no other game like this but if anyone knows a way to play tell me please
This game is the worst for the love of God this game got to be the worst. I hope it dies and burns.

reviews.review_title: 11 Months and were all gonna keep waitin
reviews.review_description:
It's been 11 months since I last heard anyone in this game. And I and many others will wait even longer, please don't give up on the game,Try your best to get that photon update done so we as a community can play this amazing game again! Take as long as you need we will be waiting!

24/04/2024 Edit: Idk how long it's been tbh, but I miss hearing my mates in this game. I'm not sure if you've given up, or you've got stuff going on, But Please, bring multiplayer back, If you have given up maybe let someone else develop the game?
Thank you for all the laughs and fun you've brought us :)
Is there a way to release multiplayer early? Because i watched videos of this game and installed it. Now I have to wait (sorry if i sound impatient)

developer_response.body: That’s what I’m trying to fix. If I release early, I’ll be broken and impossible to play. For some reason, people can’t be patient

reviews.review_description: Probably when it had multiplayer it was my favourite game on vr and i replayed it alot so yea its a very good game and you should play it!
When you no clip while playing gorilla tag
Everytime I go in it I cant play multi player and I can't see my own avatar in the mirror
please release ur new update already cant wait
Every time you try to play this game it's only me and I'm invisible if it's just me tell me but not just me fix your game or else I wanna play it but I can't please fix this developers

developer_response.body: multiplayer is down until next update

reviews.review_description: For some reason sometimes if you open and close the app multiple times it won’t load you into a server instead your by yourself and can’t see your character

developer_response.body: the reason for that is that i use a free multiplayer service that i need to refresh every 50 hours. And that could happen when i sleep for example

reviews.review_description: Dev I know the serves are not working and it's next update but you just keep saying "next update" with out telling us a certain date but overall this game is one of the best backrooms game ever but all I just want is the certain date.

developer_response.body: Well that's the thing. There is no certain date. I'll either ditch photon and release the free multiplayer early or just continue working

reviews.review_description: I am having the same problem it won't show avatar won't work ether so please fix it

reviews.review_title: I cant see anyone and me
reviews.review_description: How do fix it?

developer_response.body: multiplayer is down until next update

reviews.review_description: Dis game is trash it doesn’t let me play multiplayer

developer_response.body: *this* Multiplayer is down until next update

reviews.review_description: Perfect game. It scared me a few times haha!
I haven't played yet but once I saw that there's Multiplayer I had to get it immediately this will be so fun.

reviews.review_title: The spooky men, and the map at spawn
reviews.review_description:
Pls make the entities a little slower, because when me and my friends play, the thing keeps catching us no matter what. 
And also pls make it so the map at the start has a little “you are here” sign or something pls.

developer_response.body:
The entity is supposed to be that fast. There's some specific routes that you have to go to escape the entity, but if it's still to fast, i cant help you.

and yes. i will put a "you are here" in the minimap

reviews.review_description: My game won't join eny sever I need help

developer_response.body: multiplayer is down until next update

reviews.review_description: I can’t see my hands but overall it’s fine and I love it
